description: SculptOK AI depth-map, relief, STL and 3D generation CLI

tools.name: credits_history
tools.description: List credit-change history, newest first (free). Optional: page (default: 1), limit (default: 20). Returns array of CreditEvent.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number (1-based)

params.name: limit
params.description: Items per page

tools.name: draw_depthmap
tools.description: Submit a depth-map draw. Cost: 10 credits (style=pro 2k 15; style=pro + draw_hd=4k 30). Async: returns promptId; poll with 'draw status'. Required: image-url. Optional: style (default: normal), hd-fix (default: manual), optimal-size (default: true) (plus 3 more).

params.name: image-url
params.description: Uploaded image URL (from the upload step / a SculptOK-hosted src URL)

params.name: style
params.description: Depth-map style. pro unlocks version/draw_hd/exr. Default normal.

params.name: hd-fix
params.description: AI optimization: auto to enable, manual to disable. Default manual.

params.name: optimal-size
params.description: Enable optimal output size. Default true.

params.name: ext-info
params.description: Bit depth; when set, only one image is returned. exr requires style=pro.

params.name: version
params.description: Model version, only effective when style=pro. Default 1.0.

params.name: draw-hd
params.description: Resolution, only effective when style=pro. Default 2k. 4k costs 30 credits.

tools.name: draw_restore
tools.description: Submit background-removal and/or HD restoration. Cost: 2 credits. Async: returns promptId. Required: image-url. Optional: hd-fix, remove-back.

params.name: image-url
params.description: Uploaded image URL

params.name: hd-fix
params.description: Apply HD restoration.

params.name: remove-back
params.description: Background removal model; omit to skip background removal.

tools.name: draw_status
tools.description: Get the status of a submitted draw by promptId (free). status/currentStep/position and imgRecords on completion. Required: uuid.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The promptId returned by a draw submit

tools.name: draw_stl
tools.description: Submit an image-to-STL job. Cost: 3 credits. Async: returns promptId. Required: image-url. Optional: width-mm (default: 120), min-thickness (default: 1.6), max-thickness (default: 5) (plus 2 more).

params.name: image-url
params.description: Input image URL (png/jpg/jpeg/webp/bmp/exr)

params.name: width-mm
params.description: Output model width in mm (range 40-240). Default 120.

params.name: min-thickness
params.description: Minimum thickness in mm for the brightest area (range 0.4-8). Default 1.6.

params.name: max-thickness
params.description: Maximum thickness in mm for the darkest area (range 0.4-25). Default 5.0.

params.name: invert
params.description: Invert grayscale (black shallow, white deep). Default false.

params.name: scale-image
params.description: Image scale percent (0-100). Default 50.

tools.name: draw_threed
tools.description: Submit a 3D draw. Cost: 10 credits. Async: returns promptId. Required: image-url. Optional: hd-fix (default: basic).

params.name: image-url
params.description: Uploaded image URL

params.name: hd-fix
params.description: Precision of the 3D draw. Default basic.

tools.name: drawings_list
tools.description: List your past generated images, newest first (free). Optional: page (default: 1), limit (default: 20). Returns array of Drawing.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number (1-based)

params.name: limit
params.description: Items per page
